content.transcript: Thanks for using Morrowward. Dave asked for a little encouragement. Marcus Aurelius wrote, “I am rising to the work of a human being.” Small steps begin today.
content.directQuote: I am rising to the work of a human being.
content.attribution: Marcus Aurelius, Meditations, Book V, section 1; George Long translation (1862)

source.usage: The narration attributes and uses this short public-domain quotation; all surrounding words are original Morrowward copy.

disclosures.interpretation: AI-generated historical interpretation of Marcus Aurelius. This is not an authentic likeness, archival recording, or endorsement.
disclosures.voice: AI-generated narration using an xAI built-in voice. It is not Marcus Aurelius’s voice and does not imitate a historical recording.
disclosures.playback: Optional media with user-initiated playback, English captions, a transcript, and a reduced-motion poster experience.

basis: Codex/GPT original-resolution and frame-sequence review passed every hard gate and scored 29 of 30.
Human final review of the composed 15-second greeting: “Looks great bro!”
